context: Checkpoint 2026-06-27. Worker profiles now expose a product-neutral agents-as-tools SDK contract; runtime dispatch remains intentionally blocked until policy, cancellation, observability, and cost controls are proven.
current_tasks: Commit 890037be added createWorkerProfile/createWorkerToolDescriptor plus validation for plan-only worker tool descriptors in @refarm.dev/cli.
Reusable SDK names in packages/cli/src/worker-profile.ts are product-neutral; do not add Refarm-prefixed compatibility aliases before publication for names that should not have existed.

Validation passed: worker-profile and capability-index vitest, packages/cli type-check, packages/cli build, validate-packages, git diff --check, after-edit, commit, and after-commit with full Turbo cache hit.
next_actions: Return to the publication/convergence track with a plan-only release preflight that reports internal, hold, and candidate supply targets without expensive builds.
Keep runtime-dispatch worker tools plan-only until policy/cancellation/observability/cost controls are implemented and validated.
Continue auditing exported SDK surfaces before publication so reusable primitives stay product-neutral and Refarm naming remains reserved for product identity surfaces.
key_decisions_active: DEC-031: host unificado refarm com renderers TUI/Web/headless sobre contratos compartilhados.
DEC-032: produto CLI/host em apps/; packages/ guardam blocos reutilizáveis.
DEC-034: artefatos WASM Rust devem ser copiados para dist/ durante build.
DEC-035: provision para, configure ainda não existe — silo é o ponto de integração.
DEC-036 [DECIDED]: refarm chat é cliente HTTP do sidecar farmhand em :42001. Não embeda farmhand.
ADR-064 [ACCEPTED]: TokenAuthError com provider + reason + rotationUrl — produzido na camada de credenciais, renderizado por qualquer superfície.
ADR-065 [ACCEPTED]: Farmhand transparent lifecycle — refarm é o single entry point. Auto-start com Y/n confirm, detached spawn, 300ms poll. LaunchDeps interface para testabilidade.
